entity.name: bauratynov
entity.description: Systems programmer building compilers, video surveillance, and AI inference engines

projects.name: rcc
projects.description: A C11 compiler written in Rust with SSA IR, 3 backends (x86-64, WAT, WASM binary), LSP server, linter, and 11 optimizations — in 8.7K lines with zero dependencies. Compiles 100% of chibicc tests.

plans.name: Ongoing maintenance and development
plans.description: Continued development of rcc: improving C11 coverage, adding optimizations, fixing codegen correctness, expanding test suite, maintaining LSP and WASM backends

plans.name: Monthly sustainer
plans.description: Monthly support for continuous maintenance, bug fixes, and feature development

history.description: v1.0.0 release: 41/41 chibicc tests, SSA IR, 3 backends, LSP, 11 optimizations
